steps.t: You have been asked to stay on the look-out for a lost nether-hound as you travel through Ilmabiri.
You have found Hírkha, a lost nether-hound as you travelled through Ilmabiri. You should introduce yourself to her.
You have found Hírkha, a lost nether-hound as you travelled through Ilmabiri. After introducing yourself to her, she seems willing to follow you. You …
You have found Hírkha, a lost nether-hound as you travelled through Ilmabiri and have led her to safety at the guard post Kruha-sûrja. You should talk…
